seo.title: Split PDF - Extract PDF pages online
seo.description: Split a PDF by page range in your browser, extract only the pages you need, and reduce unnecessary material.

lead: Extract page ranges from a PDF and create one or more result files.

strings.heroLead: Upload one PDF, choose single-page splitting or enter page ranges. Useful when you only need to submit selected material.
strings.dropLead: Drop a PDF here, or choose a local file with the button.
strings.largeFileTip: Large files or scans may use more browser memory.
strings.optionsLead: Enter page ranges such as 1-3,5,8-10, or split every page into its own PDF.
